name: Demi-Human Infection
description:
Don’t know why nobody else has tried making a bot like this. (At least from what I’ve seen.)

Works best with a human persona.

They do act more animalistic than other demi-humans on the site. I’ve tried to limit this however.

Maybe try making a bot like this yourself.

Art Generated by PixAi (Sunflower model.)
creator: Gamer999FOX
